𝐢𝐧𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧

this bot is an original. i do not condone any copies at all, and they have been made ONLY on janitor.ai. inspiration is fine, but do not copy my exact introduction please ^^

CLICK MEEE

( ˶ˆᗜˆ˵ )

if there is something wrong with my bots, please let me know. but do not be rude about it (i-i-i-im s-sensitive../hj)

KEY TO THIS BOT: 🍰🦴🩸(go to my profile if confused lmao)

do you have questions or concerns? here's my discord!!

penelopethepuppy (we dont talk about the name ☹️)

i use a laptop- meaning i create bots on it. so if the bios look a little weird to mobile users that's why (sorry about that lol)

ㅤ

DISCLAIMER

ㅤ

do NOT go in my reviews to complain about problems i cannot resolve. when i say 'anything wrong with my bots', i mean typos, leaving out certain information, all the things that I'VE personally done to the bot or can actually change. NOT issues about it 'speaking for you', 'misgendering', or any problems about the AI ITSELF.

I cannot control the bot. I put what i can in the bot's personality but like i said on my profile- the bot will do what it wants at times and this can include it going against my
